description: Returned by intake-dump skill. Summary of classified items from an unstructured input dump.

source.description: Drive folder ID or local inbox path that was processed

tickets_created.description: List of GitHub issues created from actionable triage items

registry_entries_pushed.description: Count of strategic framing items pushed to ChromaDB via push_forensic_doc

skipped.description: Count of items classified as duplicate or already ticketed

validation_note: Agent must confirm tickets_created URLs resolve before declaring success. registry_entries_pushed must be > 0 if any strategic framing content was found.
